ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label associated with the data point */,
  "number_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points associated with this label (e.g., for hierarchical data points) */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "parent_point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent data point (if any) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  "time_series" TEXT /* Timestamp data associated with the data point */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., spatial, time series, categorical) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data point in JSON format */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data point (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_parent_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a data point */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the label associated with the data point */,
  "number_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points associated with this label */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the data point */,
  "parent_point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent data point (if any) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point version was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_parent_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data point */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point belonging to the cluster */,
  "cluster_label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the cluster */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Clustering algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the clustering algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was created */,
  "cluster_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality or confidence of the clustering */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_clusters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_clusters_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that is an anomaly */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Score indicating the degree of anomaly */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Anomaly detection algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the anomaly detection algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly detected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who detected the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_anomalies_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_anomalies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point associated with the trend */,
  "trend_label" TEXT /* Label assigned to the trend */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Trend analysis algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the trend analysis algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was analyzed */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who analyzed the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_trends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_trends_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("point_id")
)
